title: Sanji Faces the Vinsmokes
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Pudding, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Carrot, Unknown person #8 as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Sanji is forced back into the Vinsmoke family’s control, revealing the cruelty behind his royal bloodline.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please, I have a prior engagement I must tend to immediately!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Right now, nothing takes priority over finding you the perfect dress!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Madame pudding... do as we say, S'IL VOUS PLAIT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is the one...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Oh my, it would look absolutely revishing on you!')

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I dare say there are too many options here... there's not a single dress that wouldn't suit you. Madame! (?)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Madame pudding, perhaps we should choose an outfit with your groom's taste in mind?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! but... that's just... I mean, we've only met each other once!! :)

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Ehhhhhh?! Miss pudding! What in the world?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems she was unable to escape the watchful gaze of her handlers.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She should have joined up with Luffy and the others long ago!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the looks of things... Sanji probably has no clue that we've arrived here either!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just who were the people Luffy saw back at the coast then?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: who knows... He probably mistook some others for them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...!! that man over there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's Baron Tamago!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: BARON, WE'D LIKE TO HAVE A WORD WITH YOU...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Regarding the straw hat pirates' ship that had recently docked at chocolstown...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Say what?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've received Intel that Sir Pekoms was nowhere to be seen by the time the ship set sail.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: My god, they know everything ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've also confirmed that 4 of the straw hats have entered "The seducing Woods".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The chances of escape for them is pretty much nil at this point, so capturing them is a foregone conclusion!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did they just say that the capture of Luffy and the others is imminent?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that being said, we're still in the dark as to the whereabouts of the two remaining crew members.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oh dear Lord, it's us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: These are their posters.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Dead: alive. Shekbrook.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could they possibly be this well- informed about our movements?! They've clearly been keeping tabs on us from the very beginning!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could they have gathered all this Intel so effortlessly?!

dialogue.speaker: Carrot
dialogue.text: Non, non... that MINK is no leopard.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He is a jaguar milk, and he goes by the name "pedro"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Are you acquiring- tances?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ah, well... yes, you could say that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, I have an inkling as to where we might find that milk.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But for now, focus your attention...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And do everything you can to locate Pekoms!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Aye, sir.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When it was discovered that he still lived...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I had con- sidered taking him to Mama and begging for her forgiveness.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, BESPITE every- thing that's been going on recently ....We have a long history together as partners.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But now this... talk about a rock and a hard place.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We are truly in dire straits!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA AAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: North- Eastern Coast

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WAAAAAHA AAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oi, pipe down, Jr.!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: BWAA AAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Pipe...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: down

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, look at him laugh :) He's so precious!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Kyahaha, Kyahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Alrighty! Dasa good boy..)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But once puberty kicks in, you better be on your way to becoming a badass, sexy gang leader like your old man... and do the family name proud! :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 22nd daughter of the Charlotte family (bege's wife) CHARLOTTTE CHIFON

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: Bege's son CAPONE GANG PETZ

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 57 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
